name: assess
description: An evidence-bound intent-vs-code assessment layer for Claude Code and tool agents. Install it as a plugin to give your coding agent a deterministic assessment boundary: it reads a repo, builds an index, generates a validated assessment-graph.json, and returns gaps in three directions (intent→code, code→intent, baseline→code). Every finding cites deterministic evidence or a bounded missing-code proof, and anything NOT assessed is named explicitly. Rendered on an interactive dashboard. It never edits your code.
